key_findings: The FY2025 annual filing ties Hitachi Energy growth to power distribution transformers, power receiving and transforming equipment, and expanded production capacity.
The FY2025 annual filing links clean-energy expansion to development of power grids and microgrids.
The FY2026 semi-annual filing states that order backlog conversion into sales in Hitachi Energy Ltd contributed to revenue growth.
parse_limitations: The deterministic parser currently extracts keyword snippets, which still require analyst review for strongest evidence selection.
